title: selaginella xanthoneura
intro: Selaginella xanthoneura, also known as Xanthoneura spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, epiphytic plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella xanthoneura include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Selaginella xanthoneura can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
